title: Karpathy's LLM wiki gist
body_markdown:
## Karpathy's LLM wiki gist

The reference baseline for this whole project. Three layers:

1. **Raw sources** — immutable input documents
2. **The wiki** — LLM-owned markdown (summaries, entity pages)
3. **The schema** — a config doc specifying structure

Three operations: ingest, query, lint. Key philosophy:

> *"The wiki is a persistent, compounding artifact."*

The LLM does all the bookkeeping (cross-references, contradictions,
consistency) because humans abandon wikis when maintenance burden
outgrows value. That observation is the whole insight.

See: [original gist](https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f)
